frames.image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery interior behind a wooden counter. Extreme close-up of a pair of weathered hands covered in burn scars, slowly peeling a faded handwritten menu off a dim wall. The hands belong to a male, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean build with slightly hunched shoulders, wearing a faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars on forearms. Warm tungsten lighting from a single overhead bulb casts deep shadows on the wall, leaving a clean rectangular outline where the menu once hung. Shallow depth of field, close-up camera angle, muted earthy tones.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery 'Mo Shi' behind the counter. A male, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean build with slightly hunched shoulders, wearing a faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars. He holds a neat stack of folded menus in his scarred hands, his tired gaze directed toward a handwritten 'CLOSED PERMANENTLY' sign hanging on the glass entrance door. The empty counter and bare wall behind him. Close-up on upper body and face, warm dim interior lighting, melancholic and solitary atmosphere.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery 'Mo Shi' entrance. Over-the-shoulder shot from behind a male figure (45-50, gray-white disheveled short hair, faded navy chef coat, slightly hunched shoulders) looking toward the entrance door. The door is ajar, cold blue rain pouring outside. Standing in the doorway is a female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over her shoulders, pale skin, slender build, wearing a beige trench coat dripping with rainwater, a vivid jade green bracelet on her right wrist catching the light. Cold blue-white exterior rain light contrasts with warm interior. Over-shoulder camera angle, cinematic rain atmosphere.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance. Medium shot of a female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, pale skin, slender build, wearing a beige trench coat soaked with rain, a vivid jade green bracelet prominent on her right wrist. She stands firm in the open doorway, not leaving, rain falling heavily behind her. Her expression is quiet determination. Cold blue backlight from the rainy street silhouettes her figure, a small door chime visible above. Cinematic rain bokeh in background.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery 'Mo Shi' bar counter. Medium shot across the wooden counter. A female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, pale skin, slender build, wearing a beige trench coat, jade green bracelet on right wrist, sits at the bar counter. Small puddles of rainwater collect on the worn wooden surface where water drips from her hair tips. She speaks with a hesitant expression. Opposite her behind the counter, a male, 45-50, gray-white disheveled short hair, yellowish skin, lean hunched build, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves showing burn scars, looks up with guarded eyes. Warm overhead pendant lighting illuminates the counter between them.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Extreme close-up on the face of a male, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean build. His eyes are wide with shock — pupils dilated, breathing visible through slightly parted trembling lips. Folded menu papers are caught mid-fall from his hands in the lower frame. Dramatic side lighting creates harsh shadows across half his face, the other half lit by warm amber light. Shallow depth of field, intense emotional close-up.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery wall. Close-up of a bare wall section with a faint clean rectangular outline where handwritten menus once hung, surrounded by slightly discolored aged wall. Dramatic moody lighting, shallow depth of field with the clean patch in sharp focus. The shot evokes absence and memory. Warm-to-cool transitional lighting.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Close-up on a trembling male hand gripping a female's right wrist, the vivid jade green bracelet prominent between his scarred fingers. The male, 45-50, gray-white disheveled short hair, yellowish skin, lean slightly hunched build, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars, stands rigid with tension — his body taut as a bowstring. The female, 28-32, pale skin, wet black long hair, beige trench coat, remains still. His knuckles are white, veins visible. Dramatic overhead lighting casts deep shadows, intense emotional confrontation.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Medium shot of a female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, pale skin, slender build, wearing a beige trench coat, jade green bracelet on her right wrist (held by someone off-frame). Her free left hand reaches into her coat pocket and pulls out a smartphone. Her expression carries a heavy sense of purpose and solemnity — eyes downcast with weight of mission. Dramatic lighting with warm rim light from behind, face partially in shadow. The phone screen begins to glow in her hand.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Close-up of a male, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean hunched build, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves. He has collapsed onto a bar stool, all strength drained from his body. His eyes are red-rimmed, lips trembling, silent tears streaming down his weathered face. A smartphone glowing with an audio waveform is held in a pale female hand in the mid-ground. Cold blue neon light from the rain-streaked window behind creates halos and bokeh. Shallow depth of field on his tear-streaked face.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Wide close-up of a male, 45-50 years old, gray-white disheveled short hair, yellowish skin, lean hunched build, faded navy chef coat. He sits slumped on a bar stool, head bowed, shoulders shaking with silent sobs. Tears glisten on his cheeks. Rain streaks down the window behind him, neon lights outside blurred into pink, blue, and amber halos through the wet glass. The scene is deeply emotional and still. Cold exterior light mixes with fading warm interior light.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Medium shot of a female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, pale skin, slender build, beige trench coat, jade green bracelet on right wrist. She gently places a small kraft paper envelope on the worn wooden counter surface. Her movement is careful and respectful. A male figure, 45-50, gray-white hair, navy chef coat, sits slumped on a stool in the background, slightly out of focus. Warm soft lighting from above, the envelope is the focal point on the counter.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance from inside. Medium shot of a female, 28-32 years old, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, pale skin, slender build, beige trench coat, jade green bracelet on right wrist, seen from behind as she walks toward the glass door. She gives one last look over her shoulder. The door chime hangs above. Beyond the door, rain falls in the dark street. Warm interior light behind her, cold blue outside. The silhouette of the slumped male figure at the counter is reflected faintly in the glass door.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance interior. Medium shot of a male, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean build with slightly hunched shoulders, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars. He stands at the entrance door, his weathered hand resting on a hanging sign that reads 'CLOSED PERMANENTLY' in handwritten characters. His fingertips trace the paper surface. His eyes are red but carry a glimmer of quiet resolve. Warm golden light from inside the shop. Emotional and contemplative.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance. Close-up of a scarred hand flipping a hanging door sign. The sign is mid-flip, transitioning from 'CLOSED PERMANENTLY' to reveal the other side reading 'OPEN'. The hand belongs to a male, 45-50, with burn scars on wrist and forearm, sleeve of a faded navy chef coat rolled up. Warm golden light from inside the eatery spills through the glass door onto the wet street outside. A sense of new beginning and catharsis. Warm hopeful lighting.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Close-up of a small kraft paper envelope lying untouched on a worn wooden counter surface. Through the slightly translucent corner of the envelope, the faint outline of a photograph is visible inside. Soft warm light from above illuminates the envelope. The surrounding counter is empty — a single water ring stain and faint water droplets nearby. The edges of the frame begin to darken into a vignette, fading to black. Quiet, contemplative, mysterious. Shallow depth of field centered on the envelope.
